memberdef.argsstring: (Id newParent, Id newId, unsigned int n, bool toGlobal) const
memberdef.name: copyElement

detaileddescription.para: Virtual copier. Makes a copy of self.

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int rawIndex, unsigned int fieldIndex=0) const
memberdef.name: data

detaileddescription.para: virtual. Looks up specified field field entry. First it finds the appropriate data entry from the rawIndex. Then it looks up the field using the lookupField. Returns the data entry specified by the rawIndex, fieldIndex.

Note that the index is NOT a DataIndex: it is instead the raw index of the data on the current node. Index is also NOT the character offset, but the index to the data array in whatever type the data may be.
The DataIndex has to be filtered through the nodeMap to find a) if the entry is here, and b) what its raw index is.
Returns 0 if either index is out of range.

memberdef.argsstring: (Id parent, Id kid, const Cinfo *c, const string &name, const FieldElementFinfoBase *fef)
memberdef.name: FieldElement

briefdescription.para: Virtual: Returns location of specified dataId.

detaileddescription.para: Virtual: True if this is a FieldElement having an array of fields on each data entry. So true in this case.

briefdescription.para: Virtual. Returns true if global, ie, if its parent is global.
Virtual: Returns index of first data entry on this node.
Virtual: Returns number of data entries.
Virtual: Returns number of field entries for specified data.
Virtual: Returns number of data entries on current node.
Virtual: Returns converted dataId to index on current node.

detaileddescription.para: virtual Changes the number of entries in the data. Not permitted for FieldElements since they are just fields on the data.
virtual. Changes the number of fields on the specified data entry.

briefdescription.para: Virtual: Returns start DataIndex on specified node.
Virtual: Returns number of field entries on current node.

detaileddescription.para: Virtual: after replacing Cinfo of parent, we need to replace Cinfo and fef here. The zCinfo is the new Cinfo for this FieldElement.
Virtual func: leave the clearing of the messages to ElementBase, the data is cleared by the parent Element of this field.

Specialization of Element class, used to look up array fields within objects when those fields each need to have independent Element capabilies such as messaging and subfield lookup. Made automatically by Elements which have such fields.
